name: Way Where There's a Will
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>仇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>すれば<ruby lang="jp"><rb>通</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>図</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During the Main Phase: The turn player can activate this effect; excavate cards from the top of your Deck, up to the number of cards your opponent controls, and if you do, add 1 of them to your hand, also, after that, place any remaining cards and 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck in any order. You can only use this effect of "Way Where There's a Will" once per turn. During the End Phase of any turn a player excavated 9 or more cards at once by this card's effect: That player can activate this effect; shuffle all cards your opponent controls and in their GY into the Deck.
eff: During the Main Phase: The turn player can activate this effect; excavate cards from the top of your Deck, up to the number of cards your opponent controls, and if you do, add 1 of them to your hand, also, after that, place any remaining cards and 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck in any order. You can only use this effect of "Way Where There's a Will" once per turn. During the End Phase of any turn a player excavated 9 or more cards at once by this card's effect: That player can activate this effect; shuffle all cards your opponent controls and in their GY into the Deck.

action: Adds excavated cards to the hand
Places excavated cards on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's hand on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's hand on the bottom of the Deck
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
